inline_comments.message:
it's better to take item.name +
                                ' ' +
                                (currentWorkflowVersion.id === item.id
                                    ? currentWorkflowVersion.state.toUpperCase()
                                    : item.state)  out from return to constant or you don't need { } with return ()  
map(item => (<option
                            key={'versionSelect' + item.id}
                            value={item.id}
                            data-test-id="vc-version-option">
                            {item.name +
                                ' ' +
                                (currentWorkflowVersion.id === item.id
                                    ? currentWorkflowVersion.state.toUpperCase()
                                    : item.state)}
                        </option>)
